text: Museum board ran late. Home by seven? Lamb in the oven.
Seven works. Stopping at Bridget's on the way.
Good. Tjoruhusid booked for your birthday weekend, the 14th. Maeve's coming.
Windy's easing Thursday. Looking at a five-day run from the 1st. You and the lads good?
Aye. Tomas and Gunnar are set, junior too. I'll load provisions Tuesday.
Aboard by 05:30 the 1st. Cod north of the fjord first, then work the haddock east.
Understood. Fuel's topped, ice aboard. See you on the tide.
Still good for Friday landing? I'll have the crew on the cod.
Friday late afternoon, weather holding. ~18 tonnes cod. Confirm by VHF on approach.
Coffee at the hut, half six? Want your read on the swell off Bolungarvik.
I'll be there. Swell's dropping but there's a band of ice north, keep east of it.
Noted. Pint at Husid Friday if I'm back in time.
Stock report came through from the institute. Solid work. Still on for the 7th?
Yes, me and Erin drive up the 7th. Take me out on the boat? Been too long.
Half day if the weather holds. Bring the oilskins, not the lab coat.
Term fee landed, thanks Dad. Placement starts November so I'm flat out.
Proud of you. Home for Mum's birthday the 14th, yeah? Tjoruhusid.
Calling in after the boat check, Ma. Need anything from the shop?
Just milk and the paper. Bring the model photos, I found another of your grandfather's.
Confirming Monday 09:00 for the safety check. Suit log's ready.
Got it. Berth's reserved for the December haulout too. See you Monday.
Christmas Eve at ours as usual? Bridget, Liam and Erin coming.
Wouldn't miss it. Drive up the 23rd. I'll bring the Jameson.
In by seven. Grabbing bread on the way.
Don't forget Maeve's bus the 24th.
It's in the calendar. I'll be at the stop.
Tjoruhusid booked for my birthday, table for four.
Good. Maeve's home that weekend too.
Sean says the weather turns Thursday.
Heard the same at the hut. Watching it.
Bridget sounded tired today. Look in on her?
Already planned. Bringing her soup.
Craig love, did you eat? You sound thin on the phone.
I ate, Mam. Coffee and porridge before the harbour.
Your grandfather's boat had a green trim, not blue. For the model.
Green it is. I'll fix the hull tomorrow.
Declan's coming for Christmas he says.
He is. Fixing your radiator while he's here.
Mind the ice out there.
Always do. Coffee tomorrow?
Cod assessment's published Dad. Biomass holding.
Saw it. Good news for the November quota.
Erin and I are up the 7th. Take me out?
Weather willing. Short run, you on the sorting.
Sending the stock model repo link for a gut-check.
I'll look. Your models never beat the hut coffee though.
Radiator at Nan's is on Declan's list right?
It is. You bring the whiskey.
Home the 24th Dad! Save me lamb stew.
Stew's on. I'll get you from the bus.
Placement's brutal this week. Nights.
Sleep when you can. Sounds like the boat.
Can you send my winter coat from home?
Posting it Monday with UPS.
Miss the harbour.
It misses you. Back for good soon enough.
Down the 24th, bringing Jameson.
Good man. Mam's radiator needs you.
How's the refit funding looking?
Reserve covers it. No borrowing.
Liam driving up too?
Him and Erin. Full house Christmas Eve.
Provisions loaded, ice booked. Fuel topped.
Good. Wednesday tide then. Junior's on sorting.
Forecast holding for the run?
Window opens Thursday. Watching the north band.
Injector set arrived at the yard.
Refit's on track. Haulout the 7th.
Gunnar's back's playing up.
Light watch for him. We manage.
Ice easing north Thursday. Good window.
Same read here. Coffee at six?
Galway match on RUV Saturday.
Recording it. Pint after at Husid.
You landing Friday?
If the window holds. Kevin wants the cod.
Christmas Eve at ours. Bridget, Declan, Liam and Erin.
I'll be up the 23rd — Declan.
Bringing the whiskey and Nan's radiator fix.
Lamb and colcannon, usual.
Maeve home the 24th too?
Yes! Can't wait — Maeve.
